title: Owens Photo Fuels Rumours: Viral shot spurs George Farmer black eye talk; injury claims unproven
summary_full: A viral photo of Candace Owens sparked speculation that her husband, George Farmer, had a black eye, while she was seen with a foot injury. Social media users fueled rumors, but there is no confirmed evidence supporting these claims. Owens addressed her injury, calling the attention unnecessary, as the online buzz continues without verified facts.
